transcript: You make it sound so easy saying all the right things It's so easy to listen to But I did not believe you It's just a beast in the zoo Burn down the zoo, watch the zoo burn Choking on all the smoke I'll take a video of you just booking it You make it sound so easy saying all the right things It's so easy to listen to But I did not believe you Burn down the zoo, watch the zoo burn Choking on all the smoke I'll take a video of you just booking it
